items.name: Engineer Rami Abu Bakr
items.role: Al Ramz Construction Projects Company | Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
items.content: My sincere thanks and appreciation to Dr. Talat and the team accompanying the course. Frankly, it was a very special training course on a personal level. To be honest, the goal was not only to pass the exam and obtain the certificate, but rather my goal was to learn and apply project management in the real world, given our work as engineers and site managers.

items.name: Dr. Faten Al-Buaishi Al-Kilani
items.role: Lecturer at the Faculty of Law, University of Tripoli | Libya
items.content: I enrolled in Dr. Talaat Alawady’s training program on professional project management, believing the scope of the information and skills I would receive would be beyond the scope of the program. I wondered what benefits I could gain from a specialty so far removed from this training program, as I had previously believed. I later discovered, while lecturing at law schools in Libyan universities, that I had acquired numerous significant skills that refined my approach to giving and presenting.

items.name: Faisal Al-Shabahi
items.content: Many thanks to Trainer Talat Al-Awadi for this course (Professional Project Management). It played a significant role in broadening my understanding and knowledge of project management, addressing real-world scenarios with wisdom and effective management—an approach that yields numerous practical benefits. I also extend my gratitude to the team at the Dar Al-Ibdaa Center for their outstanding efforts, as well as to my fellow trainees; it was a pleasure working and collaborating with them throughout the course.

contact.title: Let's Build Something

hero.description: Creativity House Sdn. Bhd. is a multinational training, consulting, and technology solutions company specializing in administrative development, leadership empowerment, project management, and digital transformation. Founded in 2014 and headquartered in Cyberjaya, Malaysia since 2017, we have grown into a trusted partner for organizations across the Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the global first choice in administrative and leadership development, empowering individuals and organizations to achieve sustainable success and measurable impact.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver innovative, practical, and technology-driven training and consulting services that develop human capabilities, strengthen institutional performance, and accelerate digital adoption in modern organizations.

social_proof.title: Partnered with
social_proof.description: From global energy companies to leading universities, our clients trust Creativity House to develop their people and transform their institutions.

testimonials.name: Dr. Faten Al-Buaishi Al-Kilani
testimonials.role: Lecturer, Faculty of Law — University of Tripoli, Libya
testimonials.quote: I acquired numerous and profound skills that significantly enhanced the way I deliver content. All thanks to Eng. Talaat Al-Awadhi.

testimonials.name: Eng. Rami Abu Bakr
testimonials.role: Al Ramz Construction Projects — Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
testimonials.quote: A lagging project was transformed into an architectural masterpiece. The criticism turned into sincere praise.

testimonials.name: Consultant Eng. Fathi Al-Jahdhami
testimonials.quote: I wholeheartedly recommend anyone seeking to understand project management to enroll in this comprehensive program.

testimonials.name: Mr. Faisal Al-Shabahi
testimonials.quote: Played a significant role in expanding my knowledge and understanding of projects.

testimonials.name: Dr. Oussama Ouidane

trainer.title: Meet the
trainer.name: Eng. Talaat Al-Awadhi
trainer.jobTitle: International Trainer in Leadership, Management & Project Management
trainer.bio: Engineer Talaat Hassan Al-Awadhi is a certified international trainer and expert in the fields of management, leadership, and skills development. He brings over 20 years of extensive experience delivering specialized training to public and private institutions across the Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia.
